pokemon:chansey.name: Chansey
pokemon:chansey.summary: Chansey lays nutritionally excellent eggs on an everyday basis. The eggs are so delicious, they are easily and eagerly devoured by even those people who have lost their appetite.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Chansey lays nutritionally excellent eggs on an everyday basis. The eggs are so delicious, they are easily and eagerly devoured by even those people who have lost their appetite.
A kindly Pokémon that lays highly nutritious eggs and shares them with injured Pokémon or people.
A kindly Pokémon that lays highly nutritious eggs and shares them with injured Pokémon or people.
A rare and elusive POKéMON that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to get it.
People try to catch it for its extremely nutritious eggs, but it rarely can be found.
It is said to deliver happiness. Being compassionate, it shares its eggs with injured people.
CHANSEY lay nutritionally excellent eggs every day. The eggs are so delicious, they are eagerly devoured by even those people who have lost their appetite.
It lays several eggs a day. The eggs are apparently rich in nutrients and extremely delicious.
It walks carefully to prevent its egg from breaking. However, it is extremely fast at running away.
It walks carefully to prevent its egg from breaking. However, it is extremely fast at running away.
A rare and elusive POKéMON that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to catch one.
This purehearted Pokémon shares its eggs with the injured.
A gentle and kindhearted Pokémon that shares its nutritious eggs if it sees an injured Pokémon.
A gentle and kindhearted Pokémon that shares its nutritious eggs if it sees an injured Pokémon.
Not only are these Pokémon fast runners, they’re also few in number, so anyone who finds one must be lucky indeed.
Chansey lays nutritionally excellent eggs on an everyday basis. The eggs are so delicious, they are easily and eagerly devoured by even those people who have lost their appetite.
It lays several eggs a day and won’t share them with those who have evil in their hearts.
A kindly Pokémon that lays highly nutritious eggs and shares them with injured Pokémon or people.
A rare and elusive POKéMON that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to get it.
CHANSEY lays nutritionally excellent eggs on an everyday basis. The eggs are so delicious, they are easily and eagerly devoured by even those people who have lost their appetite.
CHANSEY lays nutritionally excellent eggs on an everyday basis. The eggs are so delicious, they are easily and eagerly devoured by even those people who have lost their appetite.
This species was once very slow. To protect their eggs from other creatures, these Pokémon became able to flee quickly.
Few in number and difficult to cap­ ture, it is said to bring happiness to the trainer who catches it.
Being few in number and difficult to capture, it is said to bring happiness to the Trainer who catches it.
The eggs laid by Chansey are rich in nutrients and a favorite food of many Pokémon.
The egg Chansey carries is not only delicious but also packed with nutrition. It’s used as a high-class cooking ingredient.
Because the eggs on their bellies have been overharvested by people in the past, the Chansey population remains very small.
It seems that other Pokémon’s efforts to take its delicious, nutritious egg away from it caused Chansey to get faster at fleeing.
A kindly Pokémon that lays highly nutritious eggs and shares them with injured Pokémon or people.
A kindly Pokémon that lays highly nutritious eggs and shares them with injured Pokémon or people.
It is said to deliver happiness. Being compassionate, it shares its eggs with injured people.
It lays several eggs a day. The eggs are apparently rich in nutrients and extremely delicious.
A gentle and kind­ hearted POKéMON that shares its nutritious eggs if it sees an injured POKéMON.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Chansey lays nutritionally excellent eggs on an everyday basis. The eggs are so delicious, they are easily and eagerly devoured by even those people who have lost their appetite.

pokemon:blissey.name: Blissey
pokemon:blissey.summary: Blissey senses sadness with its fluffy coat of fur. If it does so, this Pokémon will rush over to a sad person, no matter how far away, to share a Lucky Egg that brings a smile to any face.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Blissey senses sadness with its fluffy coat of fur. If it does so, this Pokémon will rush over to a sad person, no matter how far away, to share a Lucky Egg that brings a smile to any face.
The eggs it lays are filled with happiness. Eating even one bite will bring a smile to anyone.
The eggs it lays are filled with happiness. Eating even one bite will bring a smile to anyone.
Biting into one of the delicious eggs that BLISSEY provides will make everyone around smile with joy.
This kindhearted Pokémon nurses sick Pokémon to health. It senses feelings of sadness.
If it senses sadness with its fluffy fur, a BLISSEY will rush over to the sad person, however far away, to share an egg of happiness that brings a smile to any face.
It has a very compassionate nature. If it sees a sick POKéMON, it will nurse the sufferer back to health.
Anyone who takes even one bite of BLISSEY's egg be­ comes unfailingly caring and pleas­ ant to everyone.
Anyone who takes even one taste of BLISSEY’s egg becomes unfailingly caring and pleasant to everyone.
Anyone who takes even one bite of BLISSEY’s egg becomes unfailingly caring and pleasant to everyone.
A kindhearted Pokémon that will care for any sick person or Pokémon until their health improves. The eggs it lays are delicious and bring good fortune to those who eat them.
Its fluffy fur coat acts as a sensor, enabling it to read the feelings of people and Pokémon.
Blissey senses sadness with its fluffy coat of fur. If it does so, this Pokémon will rush over to a sad person, no matter how far away, to share a Lucky Egg that brings a smile to any face.
It is a Pokémon that delivers happiness. Eating its egg is said to make one kind to everyone.
The eggs it lays are filled with happiness. Eating even one bite will bring a smile to anyone.

BLISSEY senses sadness with its fluffy coat of fur. If it does so, this POKéMON will rush over to the sad person, however far they may be, to share an egg of happiness that brings a smile to any face.

BLISSEY senses sadness with its fluffy coat of fur. If it does so, this POKéMON will rush over to the sad person, however far they may be, to share an egg of happiness that brings a smile to any face.
Blissey lays mysterious eggs that are filled with happiness. It’s said that anyone who eats a Blissey egg will start acting kindly to all others.
It has a very com­ passionate nature. If it sees a sick POKéMON, it will nurse the sufferer back to health.
It has a very compassionate nature. If it sees a sick Pokémon, it will nurse the sufferer back to health.
Even the most ferocious Pokémon become calm when they eat Blissey’s egg, which is said to be filled with happiness.
Whenever a Blissey finds a weakened Pokémon, it will share its egg and offer its care until the other Pokémon is all better.
This Pokémon is overflowing with love. Only Chansey that share a strong bond with their Trainer can evolve, so people say.
Their eggs are such a delicacy that some say eating one will bring you happiness. These eggs fetch the highest prices on the market.
The eggs it lays are filled with happiness. Eating even one bite will bring a smile to anyone.
The eggs it lays are filled with happiness. Eating even one bite will bring a smile to anyone.
The eggs it lays are filled with happiness. Eating even one bite will bring a smile to anyone.
This kindhearted Pokémon nurses sick Pokémon to health. It senses feelings of sadness.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Blissey senses sadness with its fluffy coat of fur. If it does so, this Pokémon will rush over to a sad person, no matter how far away, to share a Lucky Egg that brings a smile to any face.

pokemon:happiny.name: Happiny
pokemon:happiny.summary: It carefully carries a round, white rock that it thinks is an egg. It’s bothered by how curly its hair looks.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It carefully carries a round, white rock that it thinks is an egg. It’s bothered by how curly its hair looks.
It likes to carry around a small rock. It may wander around others’ feet and cause them to stumble.
It likes to carry around a small rock. It may wander around others’ feet and cause them to stumble.
It loves round white things. It carries an egg-shaped rock in imitation of CHANSEY.
It carefully carries a round, white rock that it thinks is an egg. It’s bothered by how curly its hair looks.
In imitation of Chansey, it keeps a round stone tucked into its belly pouch and cherishes it dearly. It gets along well with children and will sometimes play house with them for fun.
It’s too small to lay eggs yet. As a surrogate, it searches out round white stones.
It carries a round, egg-shaped rock in its belly pouch and gives the rock to its friends.
It carries a round, egg-shaped rock in its belly pouch and gives the rock to its friends.
It likes to carry around a small rock. It may wander around others’ feet and cause them to stumble.
Happiny’s willing to lend its precious round stone to those it’s friendly with, but if the stone isn’t returned, Happiny will cry and throw a tantrum.
It carefully carries a round, white rock that it thinks is an egg. It’s bothered by how curly its hair looks.
It carries a round white rock in its belly pouch. If it gets along well with someone, it will sometimes give that person the rock.
Mimicking Chansey, Happiny will place an egg- shaped stone in its belly pouch. Happiny will treasure this stone.
When it sees something round and white, Happiny puts it into the pouch on its stomach. It sometimes becomes overloaded and can’t move.
Usually it’s a well-behaved Pokémon, but if you take its round rock away, it will cry and fuss and throw a big old tantrum.
It likes to carry around a small rock. It may wander around others’ feet and cause them to stumble.
It likes to carry around a small rock. It may wander around others’ feet and cause them to stumble.
It carries a round, egg-shaped rock in its belly pouch and gives the rock to its friends.
It carefully carries a round, white rock that it thinks is an egg. It’s bothered by how curly its hair looks.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It carefully carries a round, white rock that it thinks is an egg. It’s bothered by how curly its hair looks.
